title: CORNERSTONE COMMUNITY ACCESS PROGRAM - 211info
text: CORNERSTONE ASSOCIATES CORNERSTONE COMMUNITY ACCESS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides community activities for neurodiverse individuals. 1445 SE Crystal Lake Drive Corvallis, OR 97333 Eligibility: Adults who have intellectual and developmental disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 751-9724 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 751-9724 Kenneth Smith [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information AREA SERVED: Benton and Linn Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Adult Day Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - VOCATIONAL SERVICES/EMPLOYMENT SERVICES LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - LIVING STUDIOS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
